phrases.intent_en: Ask where the concierge desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de conserjería?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mos-trah-DOHR deh kohn-sehr-heh-REE-ah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if pilgrim rates are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿disponen de tarifas especiales para peregrinos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, dees-poh-NEN deh tah-REE-fahs ehs-peh-SYAH-les PAH-rah peh-reh-GREE-nohs?

likely_response.local: Sí, presente su credencial en recepción.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ preh-SEHN-teh SOO kreh-dehn-thee-AHL EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, present your credential at reception.

responses.english: Yes, present your credential at reception.
responses.phonetic: SÍ preh-SEHN-teh SOO kreh-dehn-thee-AHL EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN
responses.local: Sí, presente su credencial en recepción.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic chapel is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿sabe dónde se encuentra la capilla histórica?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, SAH-beh DON-deh seh en-koo-EN-trah lah kah-PEE-yah ee-STOH-ree-kah?

likely_response.local: Suba al primer piso, junto al claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh
likely_response.translation_en: Inside the hotel, follow the indicator signs.

responses.english: Inside the hotel, follow the indicator signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL klah-OO-stroh
responses.local: Suba al primer piso, junto al claustro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to make a restaurant reservation
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo hacer una reserva para el restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh poo-EH-doh ah-THEHR OO-nah reh-SEHR-bah PAH-rah EHL reh-stah-oo-RAHN-teh

likely_response.local: Pida en recepción o marque el 981 58 30 94.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEE-dah EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN OH mahr-K-eh EHL
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with reception or call the indicated number.

responses.english: Speak with reception or call the indicated number.
responses.phonetic: PEE-dah EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN OH mahr-K-eh EHL
responses.local: Pida en recepción o marque el 981 58 30 94.
